title: etcd Performance Degradation and Control Plane Slowdown
description: The cluster API server is responding slowly and controllers are reporting reconciliation errors. Metrics show that etcd request latency has spiked significantly. The etcd database has not been compacted or defragmented in a long time and has accumulated a large number of stale revisions. You will diagnose the etcd performance problem, perform maintenance operations, and restore normal cluster responsiveness.
